name: Spicy Cake Buns
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Granulated sugar for the top
recipeInstructions:
1. Adjust the oven rack to the lower third of the oven.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F. Grease and flour a large baking sheet.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (except the brown sugar) into a large bowl.
4. Add the brown sugar, shortening, egg, and buttermilk to the bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until the batter is blended and smooth, about 1 to 2 minutes.
5. Stir in raisins.
6. Drop the batter by the heaping tablespoonful onto the prepared baking sheet. Sprinkle each mound with 1/2 teaspoon sugar.
7. Bake for about 15 minutes, or until the buns are golden brown.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature. Yield: 18
